hero.subtitle: From home to workplace, parking solutions to field installations — IP65-certified AC charging units, cables and accessories to simplify your EV experience.

dna.sectionHeading: From production to software — everything domestic
dna.brandHeading:
Bemis quality
Domestic EV charging solutions
dna.brandPara1: Founded in Bursa in 1994, Bemis Teknik Elektrik A.Ş. has become one of Turkey's leading electrical equipment manufacturers with over three decades of experience. Bemis E-V Charge is our EV charging sub-brand built on this deep-rooted infrastructure.
dna.brandPara2: At our facility in Bursa OSB, we handle every stage ourselves — from electronic circuit design and software to cable production and final assembly. Our products exported to over 60 countries prove how domestic engineering can compete on the global stage.
dna.quote: Quality is an expression of respect.
dna.quoteAttr: Bemis E-V Charge Team · Bursa OSB, Turkey

highlights.title: Certified Quality
highlights.desc: CE, IP65 and international EV charging standards.

highlights.title: 60+ Countries Export
highlights.desc: Bringing Turkish engineering to the world.

highlights.title: Clean Mobility
highlights.desc: Contributing to a sustainable future, every charge.

features.title: Smart Charging Management
features.desc: OCPP 1.6 / 2.0 protocol, dynamic load balancing and cloud-based remote management.

features.title: Domestic Production Quality
features.desc: Manufactured at our Bursa OSB facility to IP65, CE and ISO 9001 standards. Fully domestic from software to electronics.

features.title: Universal Compatibility
features.desc: Type 2, CCS, CHAdeMO — compatible with all EV brands, IEC 61851 & IEC 62196 certified.

features.title: Sustainable Design
features.desc: -40°C / +55°C operating range, 100,000+ hour lifespan. Long-lasting, low waste.
